returnPolicy.title: Return Policy
returnPolicy.description: Your satisfaction is important to us. If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you may be eligible for a return under the terms outlined below.
rules: Items must be returned within 7 days of delivery.
Products must be unused and in original packaging.
Customized or special-order items are not eligible for return.
Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer.
Refunds will be processed within 5–7 business days after inspection.
Damaged items must be reported within 24 hours of delivery.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: We respect your privacy. Your information will never be shared with third parties.
rules: Your personal information will remain confidential.
We do not share any information without your consent.
Information is used only to improve our services.
Payment information is secure and encrypted.

termsPolicy.title: Terms & Conditions
termsPolicy.description: Your use of the website is subject to the following terms and conditions.
rules: Users must follow the site rules.
Any misuse of the website is prohibited.
Users are responsible for the information they provide.
The site reserves the right to change the terms.

catalogs.title: Catalogs
catalogs.description: You can download our product catalogs from the links below.
